headline: A Look At Weyerhaeuser (WY) Valuation As Earnings And Price Target Signals Diverge
summary: Why Weyerhaeuser Stock Is On Investors’ Radar Today Weyerhaeuser (WY) is back in focus as investors weigh its recent share performance against current fundamentals, including US$6.9b in 2025 net sales and US$324 million in net income from its timberlands and wood products operations. See our latest analysis for Weyerhaeuser. The recent weakness, including a 5.18% 30 day share price return and a 17.46% 1 year total shareholder return, suggests momentum has cooled even as investors reassess...
